messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this section of a document.
Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

  "node_id": "0151",

  "page_index": 91,
  "page_range": "91-92"
}

Section text:
Gossip Harbor 2025优质在投创意
Source ：广大大 -广告主分析模块，选取时间段内新投放展现或热度表现较高素材展现

双端累计去重后创意： 6.3万

message.content:
This section answers retrieval questions regarding Gossip Harbor’s 2025 advertising strategy and creative performance. It covers:
- **Topics & Entities:** High-performing ad creatives for the game Gossip Harbor; data sourced from the GuangdaDa (广大大) Advertiser Analysis Module.
- **Dates & Timeframes:** Analysis window spans January–December 2025; the product’s first ad launch occurred in February 2025.
- **Metrics & Claims:** Video formats dominate at 82.2%, followed by images at 15.7%; total cumulative deduplicated creatives across dual platforms equal 63,000.
- **Definitions & Procedures:** Defines "high-quality active creatives" as assets with high new impressions or popularity/heat within the selected timeframe. Includes a user procedure to click images to play full creative videos.
- **Figures & Evidence Types:** Features interactive visual ad examples (clickable image/video thumbnails) and quantitative campaign metrics backed by third-party ad intelligence platform analytics.

response_text:
This section answers retrieval questions regarding Gossip Harbor’s 2025 advertising strategy and creative performance. It covers:
- **Topics & Entities:** High-performing ad creatives for the game Gossip Harbor; data sourced from the GuangdaDa (广大大) Advertiser Analysis Module.
- **Dates & Timeframes:** Analysis window spans January–December 2025; the product’s first ad launch occurred in February 2025.
- **Metrics & Claims:** Video formats dominate at 82.2%, followed by images at 15.7%; total cumulative deduplicated creatives across dual platforms equal 63,000.
- **Definitions & Procedures:** Defines "high-quality active creatives" as assets with high new impressions or popularity/heat within the selected timeframe. Includes a user procedure to click images to play full creative videos.
- **Figures & Evidence Types:** Features interactive visual ad examples (clickable image/video thumbnails) and quantitative campaign metrics backed by third-party ad intelligence platform analytics.
